query:
SELECT 
  ms.id, ms.sessionDate, ms.sessionNumber, ms.presence, ms.createdAt,
  a.name AS aluno_nome
FROM mentoring_sessions ms
LEFT JOIN alunos a ON ms.alunoId = a.id
WHERE ms.alunoId IN (30043, 30045)
AND ms.sessionDate >= '2026-03-15'
ORDER BY ms.sessionDate;
